summary: Frontend-only sanity + e2e testing for Dimple Beauty Salon marketing site. All 26 assertions passed (0 failures). Verified: page renders with navbar/hero/about/services/gallery/testimonials/contact/footer/floating actions, all required data-testids present, WhatsApp hrefs = https://wa.me/919867873647, tel hrefs = tel:+919867873647, map iframe src starts with https://www.google.com/maps, nav anchor click scrolls to target section, language toggle switches EN <-> हिंदी (hero + nav re-render), mobile menu opens at 390px with all mobile-nav-link-* items and mobile-language-toggle. Backend /api/ sanity returns 200 with Hello World.
critical_code_review_comments: Navbar.jsx underline span uses `group-hover:w-full` but the parent <a> does not have the `group` class — the gold underline hover effect never triggers. Either add `group` to the <a> or change to `hover:w-full` on the span's parent scope.
i18n.js brand.name in Hindi reads 'डिम्पल ब्यूटी सालों' — 'सालों' is not the standard transliteration of 'Salon' (means 'years' in Hindi). Consider 'सलोन' or 'सैलॉन' for correctness.
Hero 'Since 2014' badge is hardcoded while tagline says 'over a decade / 10+ years' — keep one source of truth (either use translations or derive from a constant).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pure frontend marketing site. No backend routes to test besides /api/ health. All data-testids listed in the review request are implemented and verified. Copy/translation tweaks and a minor Tailwind hover-group fix suggested but do not block shipping.
